se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.metadata.MetadataList

Packages that use MetadataList
Package
Description
se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.metadata
Classes and interfaces for supporting the eIDAS MetadataServiceList.
se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.metadata.impl
Implementation classes, builders, marshallers and unmarshallers for the eIDAS metadata service list types.

  • Uses of MetadataList in se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.metadata

    Method
    Description
    List<MetadataList>
    MetadataServiceList.getMetadataLists()
    Returns a reference to the list of metadata lists held.
